summary: Complete rewrite of audio multiplexer with correct architecture: shairport-sync receiver, PCM stream fan-out, Sonos/Teufel/AirPlay device backends, Express web UI with real-time SSE updates
pr_title: feat: complete rewrite of multi-device audio multiplexer
pr_body:
## Summary

- **Complete rewrite** of the audio multiplexer to fix fundamental issues: wrong library choices (video-only `airplay-protocol`), incorrect API usage (`sonos.play(stream)` doesn't accept streams), missing build config, and absent web UI
- **New architecture**: shairport-sync as AirPlay receiver spawned via child_process, StreamManager for PCM audio fan-out, device backends for Sonos (UPnP SetAVTransportURI), Teufel/DLNA (UPnP), and AirPlay (RAOP via airtunes)
- **Web dashboard** with real-time SSE updates, per-device volume/mute/enable controls, master volume, now-playing metadata display
- **REST API** for programmatic control of all devices
- **HTTP audio streaming endpoint** serving WAV-wrapped PCM for Sonos/Teufel devices to pull from

## Key Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `src/index.ts` | Application entry point with graceful shutdown |
| `src/multiplexer.ts` | Orchestrator connecting shairport, discovery, streaming, and devices |
| `src/shairport.ts` | shairport-sync process manager with auto-restart |
| `src/stream-manager.ts` | PCM audio fan-out with WAV header generation |
| `src/discovery.ts` | Device discovery via Sonos, SSDP, and Bonjour |
| `src/devices/` | Sonos, Teufel, and AirPlay output device backends |
| `src/server/` | Express server with API, audio streaming, and web UI |

## Test plan

- [ ] Run `npm run build` to verify TypeScript compilation
- [ ] Install shairport-sync on target machine
- [ ] Run `npm start` and verify AirPlay target appears in Spotify/iPhone
- [ ] Connect Sonos speaker, verify audio plays
- [ ] Open web UI at `http://<ip>:5000`, verify device controls work
- [ ] Test volume, mute, enable/disable from web UI
- [ ] Test graceful shutdown with SIGTERM/SIGINT
